_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: 10 µM SKF38393 restored normal LTP in CKO slices ( Fig. 2C , circles, 158.5+7.7%, n=8, p<0.01 vs. untreated)
details: LTP defects rescued by 10 µM SKF38393 treatment, restoring EPSP slope to 158.5±7.7% (n=8, p<0.01 vs. untreated)
